title: onobrychis oxyodonta subsp. armena
intro: Onobrychis oxyodonta subsp. armena, also known as Armenian mountain clover, is a plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Traditionally, onobrychis oxyodonta subsp. armena is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
